_rating_disclaimer: All SS/S/A/B/C/Avoid ratings are community/editorial opinion, not official.

bases.name: Expedition Tablet
bases.function: Adds a Kalguuran Expedition to a Map
bases.note: Current gameplay rule: no Expedition Tablets. Old Expedition tablet data remains legacy only; Expedition Whispers is the current gameplay knowledge tab.
bases.removal_note: OWNER RULE 2026-07-05: Expedition Tablets do not exist in the current game. If trade metadata, PoE2DB, old research, or imported packs list Expedition Tablet, treat those rows as legacy/stale/trade-leftover data and keep Expedition out of current tablet workflows.

bases.name: Ritual Tablet
bases.function: Adds Ritual Altars to a Map

bases.name: Delirium Tablet
bases.function: Adds Mirrors of Delirium to a Map

bases.name: Irradiated Tablet
bases.function: Irradiates a Map area, increasing area level by 1

bases.name: Temple Tablet
bases.function: Adds Vaal Beacons to a Map
bases.note: Suffix roll ranges incomplete; treat Temple data as experimental.

system_rules: Tablets are used in a personal Map Device to add modifiers to Maps; tablet bases have 10 uses (PoE2DB).
Precursor Towers reveal a large area and grant a Tablet after completion (PoE2DB).
Trade category filter for all tablets is map.tablet (official trade2 metadata).
CONFLICT: the inherited 'Magic only' rarity rule is incomplete — PoE2DB lists unique tablets, Ancient Infuser corrupts/modifies tablets, and passives can upgrade tablets to Rare / add max modifiers.
Modifier weights are UNKNOWN - NEEDS VERIFICATION (PoE2DB says weight info cannot be obtained from game files).

irradiated_note: Irradiated Tablet's primary value is its base function (irradiate + area level +1). Inherited research says it uses the shared prefix/suffix pool rather than a type-specific pool. Confirm in-game/trade filters each patch.

_all_modifiers_import: 2026-07-11: merged the PoE2DB 83-modifier pack. Rows added ONLY to the tablet types that can roll them (owner rule). 62 stat IDs verified against official trade2 metadata, 21 stay UNKNOWN, 58 duplicates skipped, 1 Expedition rows stored as legacy only.
_stacking_classification: 2026-07-12: every modifier row classified for cross-tablet stacking (stacks/stacks_flat/stacks_chance/redundant/unknown) based on community 3x-strat evidence + standard additive mechanics. Not officially confirmed; unknown rows need in-game verification.
